notes: Public-safe contexts may be considered for future drafting only after provider and task request policy exists.
Restricted contexts require local/private mode unless a later explicit approval policy says otherwise.
Remote providers stay disabled by default.
AI output can suggest a rights review note but cannot decide rights clearance.
Example flow uses synthetic self-authored text only.
Drafting plans never execute installers, fetch artifacts, or scan malware.
Risk classifications remain review inputs only.

relation_to_pack_contracts.evidence_pack: typed AI output may later draft evidence record candidates after validation and review
relation_to_pack_contracts.contribution_pack: typed AI output may later draft contribution item candidates after validation and review
relation_to_pack_contracts.index_pack: AI output must not mutate index packs or local indexes
relation_to_pack_contracts.source_pack: AI output may suggest source-match candidates but cannot create source truth
relation_to_pack_contracts.pack_import_report: future tooling may record AI validation results but report success is not import or acceptance

notes: AI-assisted candidates can reach a review queue only through future explicit export tooling.
The review queue contract, not AI output, governs acceptance decisions.
No model calls, provider loading, credential storage, telemetry, public-search mutation, local-index mutation, or master-index mutation are implemented.
Typed AI output validation is mandatory before any future evidence or contribution candidate drafting workflow can use model output.
